sourceTitle: Generative AI: Guidance for doctoral students, supervisors and examiners
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Must not upload any part of a student's thesis into a generative AI tool, or make use of external generative AI detection software when assessing the thesis.
evidenceLocator: Doctoral assessment > Principles for generative AI use by doctoral researchers at King's > Examiners
